## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this needed?

## Scope

- [ ] UI / interaction
- [ ] Auth / role logic
- [ ] Admin / review flow
- [ ] Supabase / data structure
- [ ] Docs / release notes

## Verification

- [ ] Local route flow checked
- [ ] No unintended change to unrelated pages
- [ ] If auth logic changed, tested `user / creator / admin`
- [ ] If UI changed, checked desktop and mobile

## Notes

- Risk or follow-up:
- Reviewer focus:
